final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input up,
    output reg [2:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 3'b000;  // Synchronous reset to zero
        end else if (up) begin
            q <= q + 1;  // Count up
        end else begin
            q <= q - 1;  // Count down
        end
    end

endmodule
